problem_statement.title: Closing the First-Response Gap in Digital Healthcare
problem_statement.identified_gap: Millions of people face significant barriers to quick healthcare access — long waits, high costs, and dangerous uncertainty about whether their symptoms require emergency care or home management. This 'first-response gap' leads to both overcrowded ERs and neglected critical conditions.
problem_statement.solution: HealthAI is a state-of-the-art AI-powered wellness companion that uses Google Gemini and Natural Language processing to bridge this gap. It allows users to describe symptoms in plain language, performs a high-precision risk assessment (Low / Moderate / High), provides personalized medically-grounded guidance, and directs users to the nearest validated healthcare facilities via Google Maps.
target_users: The general public seeking quick triage
Rural populations with limited clinic access
At-risk patients needing immediate severity assessment
problem_statement.impact: Reduces the burden on emergency services by accurately triaging low-risk cases while ensuring high-risk patients are immediately escalated with clear guidance to the nearest hospital.

google_services.usage: Core AI engine — structured symptom analysis, risk classification (Low/Medium/High), differential diagnosis, emergency detection, and personalised home-care advice
Interactive map rendered after analysis to show nearby hospitals and clinics within 5 km of user's geolocation
Fetches nearby healthcare facilities (hospitals, clinics, urgent care) based on user's current coordinates
Extracts recognized medical entities from free-text symptom input to enrich the Gemini analysis prompt with structured entity context
Serverless container hosting for the full-stack application (React frontend + Node.js backend in a single Docker container)
CI/CD pipeline — automatically builds Docker image and deploys to Cloud Run on every git push to main
Secure, managed identity provider for user accounts, supporting both Email/Password and Google Sign-In with backend token verification via Admin SDK

evaluation_areas.code_quality: Modular component architecture, separation of concerns (routes/services/middleware), consistent code style
evaluation_areas.security: JWT auth, bcrypt hashing, helmet HTTP headers, CORS allowlist, rate limiting, input sanitization
evaluation_areas.efficiency: Vite build optimisation, Cloud Run auto-scaling, SQLite for low-latency local queries
evaluation_areas.testing: Jest unit tests for business logic + Supertest integration tests for all API routes
evaluation_areas.accessibility: ARIA labels, roles, live regions, keyboard navigation, focus management, skip navigation
evaluation_areas.google_services: Gemini AI (core), Maps + Places (location), Natural Language API (NLP), Cloud Run + Build (hosting/CI-CD)
